rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Gov't Code §2306.080, which governs appointment of a database information specialist for affordable housing information dissemination.
quote: The primary responsibility of the database information specialist is to provide for the effective and efficient dissemination to the public of information related to affordable housing and community development in a form that is accessible, widely available, and easily used.
_note: No overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute concerning TDHCA database information specialist.
